name: DevHorizon 2026
title: Conference site
summary: A one-day, single-track web-dev conference site — hero with live countdown, speaker lineup, hour-by-hour schedule, ticket tiers, venue, and sponsors.
setup_questions: What's the conference name, tagline, and one-line theme?
What date is it, and in which city / at which venue?
Name 4–6 speakers with their talk titles (and companies, if you have them).
What are your ticket tiers and prices (e.g. Early Bird $199 / Standard $299)?
photo_terms: conference keynote speaker on stage with microphone
tech conference audience seated in auditorium
conference networking coffee break attendees talking
sections: Hero with conference name, tagline, date, city/venue, and 'Get tickets' CTA
About the conference (format, who it's for, what to expect)
Speakers grid with photos, names, companies, and talk titles
Schedule — single-track timeline of talks, breaks, lunch, and after-party
Tickets — Early Bird / Standard / Team pricing tiers with feature lists
Venue & travel — map, nearby hotels, how to get there
Sponsors — tiered logo wall (Platinum/Gold/Community) with a 'Become a sponsor' link
Footer with social links and newsletter signup
based_on: A single-track, one-day web-dev conference in the mold of SmashingConf / Rails World / State of the Browser — eight speakers, one room, one day, practical front-end talks.
